name: Qualys Multi-Vector EDR
description: Integrates with Qualys EDR APIs for multi-vector endpoint detection and response, incident management, threat hunting, and asset monitoring

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve EDR incidents with filtering by status, severity, and time range

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return per page

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by incident status (open, inProgress, closed)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for incident query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for incident query (ISO 8601)

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific incident including alerts and assets

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the incident

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update the status or disposition of an EDR incident

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the incident

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status: open, inProgress, closed

parameters.name: disposition
parameters.description: Disposition for closed incidents (truePositive, falsePositive, benign)

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Analyst comment to add to the incident

actions.name: List Events
actions.description: Search for endpoint events gathered by the Cloud Agent for threat hunting

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query for event hunting

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for event search (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for event search (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: Filter by event type (process, file, network, registry)

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: Retrieve EDR-enabled assets with up-to-date details and event summaries

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of assets to return

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search for assets by hostname, IP, or OS

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific EDR-monitored asset

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: Search IOCs
actions.description: Search for indicators of compromise across EDR-enabled assets

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: IOC type: hash, ip, domain, url

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The IOC value to search for

actions.name: Host Detection List
actions.description: Retrieve detections for a specific host with vulnerability and threat information

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the host

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of detections to return
